# [PKT-PRV-077](task-0144): Provider Data Dictionary Monitoring

## Purpose

Implement provider data dictionary monitoring.

## Scope

- Monitoring logic
- Definition checks
- Alerts

## Implementation

1. Implement monitoring
2. Add definition checks
3. Add alerts

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Monitoring works
2. Definitions checked
3. Alerts sent
